heading: How It Works
subtitle: Booking Tequila Mockingbirds is simple. Here’s everything you need to know.

steps.title: Tell us about your event
steps.description: Send an enquiry with your date, location, guest numbers and we'll get back to you with a tailored quote.

steps.title: Choose your line‑up
steps.description: Select from our unique frozen margarita menu

steps.title: We roll up and serve
steps.description: We arrive early to get set up to ensure we are ready for arrival of the early birds.
